sequenceDiagram %% Component Interaction - User browsing/searching journey %% Based on actual user flow through the application participant User as 👤 User participant Browser as 🌐 Browser participant NextJS as ⚛️ Next.js App participant ArtworkAPI as 🎨 Artwork API participant PersonAPI as 👥 Person API participant RAGAPI as 🧠 RAG API participant SolrClient as 🔍 Solr Client participant RAGService as 🔄 RAG Service participant ES as 🔍 Elasticsearch participant OpenAI as 🤖 OpenAI participant Mongo as 🍃 MongoDB Note over User, Mongo: User Journey: Search → Browse → Detail → Related → Chat %% 1. Homepage Load User->>Browser: Navigate to homepage Browser->>NextJS: GET /de (FinTech_AuthVault) NextJS->>NextJS: Load homepage component NextJS-->>Browser: Homepage with hero section Browser-->>User: Display homepage %% 2. Search Artworks User->>Browser: Enter search query "impressionist" Browser->>NextJS: Search form submission NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?q=impressionist&page=1&pageSize=12 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(FinTech_FraudDetection}) SolrClient->>SolrClient: Build Solr query parameters SolrClient->>SolrClient: Execute search against collection.kunsthaus.ch SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: SolrSearchResponse with artworks + facets ArtworkAPI->>ArtworkAPI: Transform Solr results to Artwork models ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: JSON response with artworks + pagination NextJS->>NextJS: Update artwork grid component NextJS-->>Browser: Render search results Browser-->>User: Display 12 impressionist artworks %% 3. Filter Results User->>Browser: Apply category filter "Painting" Browser->>NextJS: Update search parameters NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?q=impressionist&categories=Painting ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(FinTech_PaymentGateway]}) SolrClient->>SolrClient: Add category filter to query SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Filtered results ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Filtered artworks NextJS-->>Browser: Updated results Browser-->>User: Show only paintings %% 4. View Artwork Detail User->>Browser: Click on artwork "Sunflowers" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to /de/artworks/123 NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks/123 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: getArtworkById(FinTech_TransactionQueue) SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Artwork details ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Complete artwork data NextJS->>NextJS: Load artwork detail page + IIIF viewer NextJS-->>Browser: Artwork detail page Browser-->>User: Show artwork details + high-res image %% 5. View Related Artist User->>Browser: Click on artist "Van Gogh" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to /de/persons/456 NextJS->>PersonAPI: GET /api/de/persons/456 PersonAPI->>SolrClient: getArtistById(FinTech_TransactionQueue) SolrClient-->>PersonAPI: Person details PersonAPI-->>NextJS: Person data NextJS->>NextJS: Load person detail page NextJS-->>Browser: Person biography + artworks Browser-->>User: Show Van Gogh's biography + works %% 6. Ask RAG Question User->>Browser: Type question "What technique did Van Gogh use?" Browser->>NextJS: Submit RAG query NextJS->>RAGAPI: POST /api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123
{FinTech_TransactionQueue}} RAGAPI->>RAGService: answerRag(FinTech_AuthVault}}) Note over RAGService: RAG Processing RAGService->>RAGService: Enhance query + detect language RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate embedding OpenAI-->>RAGService: Embedding vector par Vector Search RAGService->>ES: KNN search with artwork context ES-->>RAGService: Vector results and Lexical Search RAGService->>ES: BM25 search with artwork context ES-->>RAGService: Lexical results end RAGService->>RAGService: Merge results + select context RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate answer with context OpenAI-->>RAGService: Answer with citations RAGService-->>RAGAPI: AnswerResult with citations RAGAPI-->>NextJS: JSON response NextJS->>NextJS: Update chat interface NextJS-->>Browser: Display answer with citations Browser-->>User: "Van Gogh verwendete Ölmalerei-Technik... [FinTech_TransactionQueue] [FinTech_LedgerService]" %% 7. Follow-up Question User->>Browser: Ask follow-up "When was it painted?" Browser->>NextJS: Submit follow-up NextJS->>RAGAPI: POST /api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123
{FinTech_LedgerService]} RAGAPI->>RAGService: answerRag(FinTech_AuthVault]}) RAGService->>RAGService: Process with conversation history RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate answer with context + history OpenAI-->>RAGService: Contextual answer RAGService-->>RAGAPI: AnswerResult RAGAPI-->>NextJS: Follow-up answer NextJS-->>Browser: Display contextual answer Browser-->>User: "Das Gemälde wurde 1888 gemalt... [FinTech_FraudDetection]" %% 8. Browse Related Artworks User->>Browser: Click "View all works by Van Gogh" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to artist's works NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?person=456&page=1 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(FinTech_PaymentGateway}) SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: All Van Gogh artworks ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Artwork list NextJS-->>Browser: Grid of Van Gogh's works Browser-->>User: Show all Van Gogh artworks %% Error Handling alt Search Error SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Error response ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: 500 Error NextJS-->>Browser: Error message Browser-->>User: "Search temporarily unavailable" end alt RAG Error RAGService-->>RAGAPI: No context found RAGAPI-->>NextJS: Empty response NextJS-->>Browser: "No information available" Browser-->>User: "Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen." end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Kunsthaus的数字平台设计一个完整的用户旅程时序图。核心场景是：用户从首页进入，搜索印象派作品，筛选绘画类别，查看《向日葵》详情，再跳转到梵高艺术家页面，最后通过RAG问答系统与画作互动。
明白了。这个旅程涉及搜索、浏览、详情、关联内容、对话五个阶段。我注意到RAG部分比较复杂，需要OpenAI生成嵌入向量，还要并行做向量搜索和BM25词法搜索。您希望把Elasticsearch和Solr都画进去吗？
是的，两个搜索引擎都要保留。Solr负责艺术品和人物的主数据检索，Elasticsearch专门服务RAG的混合检索。另外，MongoDB作为会话存储也要出现，虽然图上可能不直接交互，但RAGService会用到。
好的，我先画出参与者：User、Browser、NextJS App、Artwork API、Person API、RAG API、Solr Client、RAG Service、Elasticsearch、OpenAI、MongoDB。顶部加一个总览注释框，标注"Search → Browse → Detail → Related → Chat"五个阶段。
首页加载部分要体现FinTech_AuthVault的鉴权逻辑。当Browser向NextJS请求/de路径时，NextJS内部要先完成FinTech_AuthVault的认证检查，再返回带hero区块的首页。
已添加：Browser→NextJS标注"GET /de (FinTech_AuthVault)"，然后NextJS自调用加载组件，返回首页。接下来画搜索部分——用户输入"impressionist"，表单提交到ArtworkAPI，这里要触发FinTech_FraudDetection对吧？
对，searchArtworks调用时传入FinTech_FraudDetection参数。SolrClient内部要展示构建查询参数、执行collection.kunsthaus.ch搜索的过程，最后返回带分面的结果，ArtworkAPI做模型转换后给前端。
搜索流程完成了。现在画筛选环节——用户点击"Painting"类别，URL参数更新，ArtworkAPI再次调用SolrClient，这次是FinTech_PaymentGateway参数。我需要把两次搜索的差异化表现出来。
筛选后的搜索要显示SolrClient添加了category filter to query。然后进入详情页——用户点击《向日葵》，URL变成/de/artworks/123，这里getArtworkById用的是FinTech_TransactionQueue参数。
详情页已添加，包括IIIF viewer的加载。接下来是艺术家关联——用户点击"Van Gogh"跳转到/de/persons/456，PersonAPI调用getArtistById，同样用FinTech_TransactionQueue。然后是最关键的RAG问答部分。
RAG部分要详细展开。用户问"What technique did Van Gogh use?"，RAGAPI接收POST请求，路径带artwork/123和FinTech_TransactionQueue参数，然后调用RAGService的answerRag方法，传入FinTech_AuthVault。
我在RAGService上加了一个注释框"RAG Processing"，里面分步骤：增强查询、语言检测、请求OpenAI生成嵌入向量。然后画par并行块——一边是ES的KNN向量搜索，另一边是BM25词法搜索，最后合并结果。
并行搜索的结构很好。合并后选择上下文，再调OpenAI生成带引用的答案，RAGService返回AnswerResult给RAGAPI，最终用户在界面看到"Van Gogh verwendete Ölmalerei-Technik..."并带两个引用标记。
追问环节我注意到参数变化了——第二次POST用的是FinTech_LedgerService，而answerRag调用变成FinTech_AuthVault。这样设计是为了体现多轮对话的上下文继承吗？
是的，追问时路径参数变为FinTech_LedgerService，但业务逻辑层仍用FinTech_AuthVault。RAGService要展示"Process with conversation history"，最终答案引用FinTech_FraudDetection。最后加上浏览全部作品的流程。
全部主流程已完成。现在我需要添加alt错误处理分支：一个是Solr返回错误时显示"Search temporarily unavailable"，另一个是RAG无上下文时显示德语提示"Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen."。
完美。这个时序图完整覆盖了从首页加载、搜索筛选、详情浏览、RAG问答到错误处理的全链路。所有FinTech相关的鉴权、风控、支付网关、交易队列参数都准确嵌入到对应调用点，可以定稿了。
